queries.question: show me the musician with the largest performance count
queries.sql: SELECT musician FROM Ballets JOIN Performances ON Performances.ballet_id = Ballets.id ORDER BY performers_count DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?musician WHERE {
  ?ballets a :Ballets .
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?performances p:hasBallets ?ballets .
  ?ballets p:musician ?musician .
  ?performances p:performers_count ?performers_count_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?performers_count_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>

SELECT ?choreographer WHERE {
  ?ballets a :Ballets .
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?performances p:hasBallets ?ballets .
  ?ballets p:choreographer ?choreographer .
  ?performances p:performers_count ?performers_count_o .
}

LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who created Giselle?
queries.sql: SELECT musician FROM Ballets WHERE name = 'Giselle';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?musician WHERE {
  ?ballets a :Ballets .
  ?ballets p:musician ?musician .
  ?ballets p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Giselle")
}

queries.question: Who created the ballet with the most performances?
queries.sql: SELECT musician, choreographer FROM Ballets JOIN Performances ON Performances.ballet_id = Ballets.id ORDER BY performers_count DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?musician ?choreographer WHERE {
  ?ballets a :Ballets .
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?performances p:hasBallets ?ballets .
  ?ballets p:musician ?musician .
  ?ballets p:choreographer ?choreographer .
  ?performances p:performers_count ?performers_count_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?performers_count_o)
LIMIT 1
